**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Oulipu Electronic Co., Ltd. is an extremely absurd and darkly humorous specimen of systemic misjudgment: this is a 'single-person micro-enterprise acting as a dry cleaner hidden in an office building while selling a few routers.' The forensic engine has forcefully cleaned the underlying fake consumer electronics OEM data implicated by Apple Inc. The official commercial system mechanically categorized it into the top of the industrial pyramid, 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing,' simply because its name contains 'Electronic' and its license mentions 'communication equipment sales'! The physical probe directly initiated a demotion strike: this is a living fossil-level old shop established in 1997, with a paid-in capital of only 510,000, and its 2024 insured headcount is surprisingly only '1 person.' Its registered address is 'Room 511, No. 28 Huju South Road, Qinhuai District, Nanjing.' In a single room on the 5th floor of an ordinary office building, relying on the boss alone to operate machines to 'manufacture electronic devices'? This completely violates basic physical and industrial common sense. And the most laughable part is its extremely magical business license: the first half is 'communication equipment sales; electronic components retail,' and the second half suddenly makes a 180-degree turn to become 'laundry and ironing services; dyeing and washing services'! The diagnostic conclusion is without suspense: this is absolutely not a high-tech electronic manufacturing plant. This is a 'One-Person Dry Cleaner & Electronics Retailer wearing the cloak of an electronics company in an office building.' The boss (Jiang Ning) highly likely opened a dry-cleaning shop in the office building for receiving and dispatching clothes (serving white-collar workers in and around the building), while concurrently utilizing this old shell to resell some routers, network cables, or small electronic components in the building to earn extra income.
